seo.title: Privacy
seo.description: Privacy notice placeholder for the technical-product-showcase demo site. Replace with reviewed legal copy before launch.

sections.title: Privacy Notice
sections.description: This page is a structural placeholder. It exercises how the technical-product-showcase theme renders a legal page without a hero image.

sections.title: What this notice covers
sections.description: A real privacy notice would describe what personal data is collected through the contact form and the /api/lead endpoint, the lawful basis for processing, retention windows, transfers, and how a data subject can exercise rights such as access, rectification, and erasure. Replace this paragraph with reviewed legal copy that matches the operator's actual practice.

items.question: What data does the contact form collect?
items.answer: Name, email, optional phone, and the message body submitted by the visitor. Hidden fields capture the originating site slug, form ID, and page URL for routing only.

items.question: Where is the data processed?
items.answer: Demo placeholder. A real operator would specify processing regions, sub-processors, and any cross-border transfer mechanism here.

items.question: How long is data retained?
items.answer: Demo placeholder. A real operator would state retention windows and the deletion path for each category of data.

items.question: How do I contact the data controller?
items.answer: Reach the data controller listed in the footer at the privacy mailbox; the address flows in from site.config.ts.
